description:
Goal
Isolate true parallel quicksort test cross-contamination only after the compiler-owned native-program quicksort path is correct on a clean rebuild. The prior premise that the relevant quicksort tests pass alone is no longer true: after `cargo clean` and a fresh rebuild, one of the key tests fails by itself with `left: 3`, `right: 42`.

Observed reproduction
- `/opt/homebrew/bin/timeout 60s target/debug/deps/fz-01415279b97da685 --exact compiler2::compiler2_test::compiler2_compile_root_jit_consumes_native_program_without_legacy_prepare --nocapture` passes from the fresh rebuilt test binary.
- `/opt/homebrew/bin/timeout 60s target/debug/deps/fz-01415279b97da685 --exact compiler2::drive_test::compiler2_native_program_jit_runs_quicksort_through_compiler2_codegen --nocapture` fails alone from that same binary with `left: 3`, `right: 42`.
- The older parallel-only reproduction remains useful, but it is downstream of the alone failure until `fz-rh2.18.9.17` is repaired again.

Signal
- After `fz-rh2.18.9.17` is fixed, the relevant quicksort tests pass alone and only then can any remaining parallel-only contamination be investigated.
- If a parallel-only failure remains, the fix identifies the shared mutable resource or global cache involved; no test-only sleep, retry, or broad serializing shim.
- `cargo test --lib compiler2::` closeout can rely on deterministic test isolation once the semantic and native-program blockers are fixed.

Strategy
Treat clean-build alone correctness as the prerequisite. First restore the compiler-owned native-program quicksort path under `fz-rh2.18.9.17`; then rerun the prior parallel reproductions to see what isolation bug, if any, actually survives.

Outro
No isolation diagnosis built on a broken-alone baseline, no broad serializing shim used to hide a real correctness bug, and no stale ticket text claiming the relevant tests already pass alone.

comments.text: Additional reproduction while validating fz-rh2.18.9.17 after 51ca2320b: running `compiler2::drive_test::compiler2_native_program_jit_runs_quicksort_through_compiler2_codegen` concurrently with `compiler2::compiler2_test::compiler2_compile_root_jit_consumes_native_program_without_legacy_prepare` failed with `left: 3`, `right: 42`. Both tests pass alone under `/opt/homebrew/bin/timeout 120s`. This broadens the suspect shared state from backend interpreter artifact lookup to native/JIT executable/root behavior.

title: Compiler2 tests: isolate parallel quicksort backend artifact runs
